currentProgram.title: Live FA Cup Final: Chelsea v Manchester City
currentProgram.description: Action from the final of the 2026 Emirates FA Cup final between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and eight-time winners Chelsea at Wembley Stadium.

programs.title: Live: FA Cup Final Day
programs.description: We bring you all the build-up to one of the biggest fixtures in the football calendar, as Manchester City and Chelsea prepare to collide in the Emirates FA Cup final at Wembley.

programs.description: Action from the final of the 2026 Emirates FA Cup final between Pep Guardiola's Manchester City and eight-time winners Chelsea at Wembley Stadium.

programs.description: Back to Reality: The hapless Red Dwarf crew stumble upon a deserted spaceship but call off a salvage operation when a gargantuan sea monster appears from the murky ocean. S5 Ep6

programs.description: Memory: Lucy is not best pleased when Lee decides to watch her favourite TV programme, especially when his inability to remember the star's name makes him think he is losing his memory. S10 Ep5

programs.description: Whodunnit?: Unable to convince Lucy that he did not smash a blue-and-white antique vase that belonged to her grandmother, Lee summons the family to a meeting to flush out the culprit. S10 Ep6
